judgments.description: The '## Tasks' section contains only one sentence ('A task is a single browser automation goal. You give Skyvern a `prompt` and an optional `url`, and it figures out the rest.') before its subsections, but those two sentences do provide meaningful context, so this is borderline. However, the '## Retrieve, poll, and manage runs' section has no introductory content at all before its subsections — it is just a heading acting as a label with zero descriptive sentences, which adds no value beyond organizing the subsections.
